description_long: This bungalow features a simple, rectangular structure with a prominent dark gable roof and a light-colored base platform. The front facade displays three vertical rectangular windows and a central door, all set within a symmetrical arrangement. The building sits on a large, flat green lawn, bordered by a paved walkway that curves toward the entrance. The roof is steeply pitched, extending over the sides and front, and the walls appear to be constructed from a dark material, possibly brick or painted wood. The base platform is slightly elevated and bordered by a lighter material, likely concrete or stone. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, rectangular bungalow with a steep dark gable roof, symmetrical front windows, and a light elevated base set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical windows and a central door, with a curved walkway leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof and the solid, windowless side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back wall with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the walkway curving away, showing the gable roof and the side elevation.
